content: I will declare the sub-tab selection state and the search query state inside `CompanyDashboard.tsx`.

args.Description: "Declare jobSubTab and jobSearch states in CompanyDashboard.tsx"

args.TargetContent: "  const [isRegisteringVacancy, setIsRegisteringVacancy] = useState(false);\n  const [editingCompanyId, setEditingCompanyId] = useState<string | null>(null);"
